cases.prompt: 우리 앱에 Notion 처럼 문서 공유 기능 넣으려고 하는데 권한 시스템 어떻게 설계해?

assertions.text: The agent recommends ReBAC (relationship-based) because the use case is document-sharing with a permission graph.
The agent provides DDL templates for authz_roles, authz_role_assignments, authz_policies, authz_audit_log.
